data.name: InvalidOrganizationUserOrWorkArea
data.value: OrganizationId, UserId and WorkAreaId must be valid.

data.name: InvalidShiftType
data.value: Shift type must be DAY, NIGHT or EMERGENCY.

data.name: InvalidShiftStatus
data.value: Shift status must be SCHEDULED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED or CANCELLED.

data.name: CheckInRequiredBeforeCheckout
data.value: Check-in is required before completing a shift.

data.name: CreateShiftRecordDatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred while creating the shift record.

data.name: UpdateShiftRecordDatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred while updating the shift record.

data.name: UnexpectedShiftRecordCreateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the shift record.

data.name: UnexpectedShiftRecordUpdateError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the shift record.
